title: oreocharis benthamii
intro: Oreocharis benthamii, also known as the Bentham's lip orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oreocharis benthamii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be used in the form of a tincture or powder for its medicinal properties.
